---
title: Trombinoscope
description: Promotion 2023-2024
date: 2023-12-11
file: "trombinoscope_2023-2024_v2023-12-11.pdf"
engine: knitr
freeze: false
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  body-width: 1000px
  margin-width: 0px
---

{{< include ../_setup.qmd >}}

`r auto_callout()`

```{=html}
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$file`"></iframe>
</div>
```
